name: kling-v3-omni-i2v
description: Kling v3 OmniPro image-to-video with native audio generation. Generates video with speech/sound from a reference image and text prompt.

dynamic_params.1.image: Filename of uploaded reference image (via POST /api/upload/image)
dynamic_params.2.prompt: Scene description including dialogue. For audio: describe what characters say and sound effects. E.g. 'Cat sits at desk and says: Stay curious. Stay suspicious. News jingle plays.'
dynamic_params.2.model_name: kling-v3-omni | kling-video-o1 (o1 does NOT support audio or storyboards)
dynamic_params.2.generate_audio: true for native audio generation, false for silent video

expected_inputs.image: Upload image via POST /api/upload/image, reference by returned filename

expected_outputs.video: MP4 video with native audio (if generate_audio=true)

notes.audio: When generate_audio=true, include dialogue and sound descriptions directly in the prompt. The model will generate matching speech and sound effects.
notes.storyboards: Supports optional storyboards for multi-segment generation (kling-v3-omni only). Use COMFY_DYNAMICCOMBO_V3 format.
notes.duration: Supports 3-15 seconds (more flexible than v2's 5/10 only)
notes.o1_model: kling-video-o1 does NOT support generate_audio or storyboards
